verse_text: 'Behold, I will send many fishermen, and they will fish them. After this, I will send many hunters, and they will hunt them upon every mountain, upon every hill, and out of the holes of the rocks.

pericope.title: God's Promise to Jew and Gentile

links.context: The great catch of fish is an image of the disciples bringing mankind to the knowledge of Jesus Christ, and it fulfills the prophecy of [[JER.16:16]]. In the festal hymn of Pentecost we sing to Christ, "Through the fishermen, You drew the world into Your net."

The great catch of fish (v. 9) is an image of the apostles bringing mankind to the knowledge of Jesus Christ, and it fulfills the prophecy of [[JER.16:16]]. In the festal hymn of Pentecost we sing to Christ, "Through the fishermen, You drew the world into Your net."
